payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT DISTINCT s.StuID FROM Student s LEFT JOIN Has_Pet hp ON s.StuID = hp.StuID LEFT JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID WHERE p.PetType IS NULL OR p.PetType NOT LIKE '%cat%';"}
